title: Seasons change: Phror arkad plian plang boi
original_title: Seasons Change เพราะอากาศเปลี่ยนแปลงบ่อย
overview: The story takes place at the College of Music, Mahidol University over one year and covers the three seasons that Bangkok typically experiences - summer, winter and monsoon.
